rationale: Educ. Code §25.002 governs public school enrollment documentation requirements (identity, records, immunizations). It has no textual or operational relationship to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: Sec. 25.002. REQUIREMENTS FOR ENROLLMENT. (a) If a parent or other person with legal control of a child under a court order enrolls the child in a public school, the parent or other person or the school district in which the child most recently attended school shall furnish to the school district:
